Home Australian citizenship

Citizenship processing times

Processing times Number of applications we have Number of applications received

Processing times

If you have applied for Australian citizenship by conferral:

  • 90% of applications are processed within 10 months

This table shows how long it is currently taking to process citizenship applications.

Application type Period counted 25% of applications are processed in: 50% of applications are processed in: 75% of applications are processed in: 90% of applications are processed in:
Australian citizenship by conferral (general eligibility and other situations)1 From date of application to decision2 5 months 6 months 8 months 10 months
From date of approval to ceremony 4 months 5 months 5 months 6 months
From date of application to ceremony 10 months 11 months 13 months 15 months
Australian citizenship by descent From date of application to decision2 4 months 4 months 5 months 7 months
Evidence of Australian citizenship From date of application to decision2 2 days 4 days 8 days 15 days

1. Includes general eligibility and other situations.

2. A 'decision' includes applications that have been approved, refused, or withdrawn.

Circumstances that affect processing times

Factors that can affect the processing time of your application include:

  • whether you have given us a complete application
  • how promptly you respond when we ask for more information

Postage times

We will print and post your Australian citizenship certificate after your application is approved.

Number of applications we have

This table shows how many applications we had on hand on 31 January 2026.

Application type Number of applications3
Australian citizenship by conferral (general eligibility and other situations)4 88,062
Australian citizenship by descent 6,220
Evidence of Australian citizenship 865

3 The numbers are correct at time of publication.

4 Includes children aged 15 years or younger.

Number of applications received

This table shows the number of citizenship applications we received between 1 January and 31 January 2026.

Application type Number of applications5
Australian citizenship by conferral (general eligibility and other situations)6 17,562
Australian citizenship by descent 1,882
Evidence of Australian citizenship 3,706

5 The numbers are correct at time of publication.

6 Includes children aged 15 years or younger.

Last updated: 24 February 2026

Department of Home Affairs
